title: euphorbia centralis
intro: Euphorbia centralis, also known as the pencil cactus, is a species of succulent plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Euphorbia centralis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant's latex is often extracted and used to make topical creams, ointments, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
